title: juncus capillaris
intro: Juncus capillaris, also known as Hair Needle Rush or Hair Needle Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Juncus capillaris can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional folk remedies for its purported healing properties.
